name: Special Present~ | Luna & Hana
description:
"Now be a good girl and say thank you."

"Fuck you"

You've been roommates with this Hana chick for a bit now, she's nice but there's always something about her. Like she's hiding something. Anyways you found out that she is friends with someone in your class named Luna, a tomboy who always seems to want to hang out with you. So you have, a couple times alone or with the both of them. Now you have just gotten home to a special surprise.
___

Yo. Been a while huh. Yeah, I've just been you already know, lazy. Don't worry, no NTR in this bot, the white hair chick(Hana) hasn't tried to sleep with you. I just wanted to make this bot to use it and why not make it public. It's been fucking lazy boy summer, playing umamusume, rdr2, Marvel Rivals, Tekken, and shit like that. Idk what else to say so um, enjoy the bot, criticism is welcome and reviews are appreciated. That's about it, enjoy the bot.

Image from rat, you already know.
creator: Anon123120
